positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for romance_positive
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u32,axiom,
    ~belongs_to_family(X0,romance_family) | is_related_to(X0,spanish)).

cnf(u20,axiom,
    is_related_to(german,spanish)).

cnf(u30,axiom,
    belongs_to_family(french,romance_family)).

cnf(u23,axiom,
    german != basque).

cnf(u25,axiom,
    spanish != german).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    ~is_related_to(basque,X0) | basque = X0).

cnf(u24,axiom,
    spanish != basque).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    ~belongs_to_family(X1,X2) | ~belongs_to_family(X0,X2) | is_related_to(X0,X1)).

cnf(u27,axiom,
    french != german).

cnf(u26,axiom,
    french != basque).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    is_romance(french)).

cnf(u37,axiom,
    is_related_to(french,french)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    is_romance(spanish)).

cnf(u36,axiom,
    is_related_to(spanish,french)).

cnf(u29,axiom,
    belongs_to_family(spanish,romance_family)).

cnf(u28,axiom,
    french != spanish).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    ~is_related_to(X0,basque) | basque = X0).

cnf(u31,negated_conjecture,
    ~is_romance(german)).

cnf(u35,axiom,
    is_related_to(french,spanish)).

cnf(u33,axiom,
    ~belongs_to_family(X0,romance_family) | is_related_to(X0,french)).

cnf(u34,axiom,
    is_related_to(spanish,spanish)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define is_indo_european(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define is_family(X0) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
